Script itself is well-written (type hints, error handling, clear structure) but fundamentally incomplete. gemini31pro.summary_excerpt: Excellent implementation. Python script uses idiomatic dataclasses and type hints, with robust error handling for XML/JSON parsing. GHA workflow is secure (least-privilege) and efficient. Markdown generation handles special characters correctly (line 227).
